en: Sometimes in life, we have to protect our own heart. Even if it means ripping it out of our chest. I'll revoi mon amour
ko: 심지어 그것이 가슴에서 찢어내는 것을 의미하더라도.

en: I'm so mature. I'm so mature. I'm so mature. I got me a therapist to tell me there's other man. I ain't doing one night
ko: 나는 정말 성숙해. 나는 정말 성숙해.
